meta.title: A Physico-chemical Sub-grouping of the Mammalian Picornaviruses

abstractHtml: Several of the physico-chemical properties of representative members of the Picornaviridae family have been examined. On the basis of their buoyant density in caesium chloride, stability at pH 3 to 7 and the base composition of the virus RNA, a division of this family of viruses into six subgroups is suggested.
